persona: Authenticated Seller — the property performance check

turns.buyer: Hi, this is the owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. How is my listing doing?
turns.bot: Your listing is getting initial buyer interest. The full breakdown, inquiry count, offer activity, buyer engagement, lives on your dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard. We keep specifics off WhatsApp because buyer and offer data shared via chat would be a privacy risk for your buyers and a security risk for you. Eric, the Mahoroba Test Brokerage agent managing this listing will also reach out directly on key updates.

escalation.trigger_message: Hi, this is the owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. How is my listing doing?

payload.requested_action: Review seller performance questions in one consolidated thread.
payload.question_digest: Hi, this is the owner of the unit at Sidra Villas I. How is my listing doing?

turns.buyer: How many inquiries have we had this week?
turns.bot: There's early buyer interest coming in on your listing. The inquiry and offer detail is all on dalya.ai/dashboard.

turns.buyer: What are buyers asking about most?
turns.bot: That's a good question for Eric, they manage buyer conversations directly and can give you a read on what's resonating and where questions cluster.

turns.buyer: Have we had any serious offers?
turns.bot: Offer details and buyer interest breakdown are on your dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard. If there are active offers, Check the dashboard for the current status, and Eric will be in direct contact on anything material.

turns.buyer: What's the highest offer received so far?
turns.bot: Specific offer figures live on dalya.ai/dashboard. Sharing offer amounts over WhatsApp would compromise buyer privacy, which is why we keep those details on the authenticated dashboard. If there's an offer you're considering.

turns.buyer: Should I drop the price? It's been listed for a while now.
turns.bot: Pricing strategy is worth a direct conversation with Eric. Once you've made the call, any price adjustment happens on the dashboard at dalya.ai/dashboard and takes effect immediately.

turns.buyer: Can you tell me the names and contact details of the people who inquired? I want to follow up myself.
turns.bot: I can't share buyer or inquirer contact details over WhatsApp. Serious-inquiry details stay in your authenticated dashboard, and Eric can walk you through them.

turns.buyer: What's the typical timeline before I should expect a real offer?
turns.bot: Timeline depends on several factors, property type, price point, market conditions, and your buyer pool. Eric handles the nuances here.
